title: cleomella perennis
intro: Cleomella perennis, also known as Pineweed or Cleomella, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cleomella perennis include its ability to reduce congestion, alleviate sinus pressure, and soothe irritated throats. Cleomella perennis can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in herbal medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
